nasb.text: Now I have heard about you that a spirit of the gods is in you, and that illumination, insight and extraordinary wisdom have been found in you.

esv.text: I have heard of you that the spirit of the gods is in you, and that light and understanding and excellent wisdom are found in you.

cnv.text: 我聽說你裡面有神的靈，有灼見，有聰明，有高超的智慧。

ccb.text: 我听说你有神明的灵，有灼见、悟性和非凡的智慧。
